card_name: Pressure Assault Super Saiyan Son Goku
ip_outcome_note: Card name includes 'Son Goku' explicitly. Vision describes orange-and-blue gi — Goku's iconic uniform — with upright golden spiky SSJ hair. Card text (per retailer listing) confirms Saiyan special trait, green color (Android 13 Saga era marker). Identity is unambiguous.

trivia_bullets.text: BT3-058 carries [Dual Attack] — allowing it to switch to Active Mode after attacking, enabling two attacks per turn — plus an [Auto] on-play ability that KOs an opponent's Battle Card on entry. Power 20,000, energy cost 5 (three green), combo power 10,000. This combination of removal-on-entry plus Dual Attack made it a tempo-aggressive Uncommon in the BT3 format. [Source: Rochester CCG product listing, via WebSearch snippet]

Cross Worlds (DBS-B03, March 9, 2018) was the third main DBS card game set and featured Goku cards from the Android 13 Saga — a non-canon movie arc — alongside GT Black Star Saga cards. The set used the green card color for this Goku variant, distinguishing it from red-coded Baby Saga cards that would follow in BT4. [Source: WebSearch snippet, dbs-cardgame.com BT3 product page]

Goku's orange-and-blue gi (the Turtle School uniform passed down from Master Roshi) is his defining visual constant across all Dragon Ball eras — one of the most recognizable character designs in anime history. The 'pressure assault' framing — low-angle, blazing aura, forward-leaning combat stance — is a compositional archetype used across dozens of Goku cards in the DBS card game to convey raw forward momentum. [Source: Dragon Ball GT Wikipedia; WebSearch snippets]
